issue: GDPR Partial: Data portability only covers course/package exports, not subject-level personal data export
tasks: Design `PersonalDataExportDto` contract and export schema (JSON + optional CSV bundle)
Build `DataPortabilityController` and async export job APIs
Implement `DataPortabilityService` with fan-out across user/billing/auth/usage repositories
Add export job persistence, status polling, and signed download URL flow
Add audit events for request/start/complete/download actions
Add integration tests for ownership, payload completeness, and expiry behavior
complexity_reason: Cross-domain data aggregation and async orchestration are required; backward compatibility must be preserved while introducing new privacy APIs and download workflow.
dependencies: Export artifact storage decision (DB filesystem vs Riak)
Infra capacity for large export generation

issue: GDPR Partial: Data minimization is inconsistent across DTOs
tasks: Inventory current DTOs and classify fields by legal/business necessity
Create purpose-scoped DTO variants and validation groups
Implement `DataMinimizationPolicyService` for endpoint-role field allowlists
Harden JSON binding for sensitive endpoints (reject unknown/excess fields)
Refactor affected controllers/services to new DTO contracts
Add regression tests for over-posting and blocked fields
complexity_reason: High controller/service touch points and high regression risk due to request-contract changes across many endpoints.
dependencies: Product/legal sign-off on minimum data set per endpoint
API contract compatibility plan for existing clients

issue: GDPR Partial: Purpose limitation is implicit, not explicit/enforced
tasks: Define `ProcessingPurpose` enum and purpose-policy matrix
Implement `@RequiresPurpose` annotation and AOP enforcement
Propagate processing context from controller to service methods
Add audit metadata (`purpose`, `legal_basis`) to trail records
Add policy caching and invalidation flow
complexity_reason: Requires cross-cutting pattern changes and method signature updates in service layer; impacts many existing flows.
dependencies: Policy ownership model (who defines and updates purpose matrix)

issue: GDPR Missing: Consent tracking ledger/versioning not implemented
tasks: Design consent domain model (`user_consents`, `consent_events`)
Implement `ConsentController` for capture/read/withdraw endpoints
Implement append-only consent event write path with integrity hash
Add consent state cache for runtime policy checks
Integrate consent checks into optional-data processing services
Add test coverage for versioning and consent withdrawal semantics
complexity_reason: New privacy subsystem with write-once event semantics and downstream integration into existing business actions.
dependencies: Event immutability approach and archival requirement

issue: GDPR Missing: Comprehensive subject-access endpoint not implemented
tasks: Define DSAR response model (machine-readable + human-readable export)
Create `DataSubjectAccessController` and DSAR request workflow
Implement `DsarAggregationService` with repository projections
Add throttling, idempotency, and async fulfillment status APIs
Persist DSAR request lifecycle and fulfillment audit records
Add e2e tests for access boundaries and anti-replay controls
complexity_reason: Broad aggregation and strict access assurance needed; similar complexity to portability with additional SLA/state tracking.
dependencies: Shared data model decisions with portability module

issue: GDPR Missing: Centralized retention/deletion policy engine for PII
tasks: Define retention policy model and rule schema
Implement `RetentionEngineService` with scheduled execution and dry-run mode
Add entity-specific deletion/anonymization handlers
Add execution logs, error dead-letter handling, and rerun support
Implement distributed lock/checkpointing for singleton scheduler
Backfill policy coverage tests for major PII entities
complexity_reason: Cross-entity destructive processing with high data-loss risk, strong idempotency requirements, and operational rollback concerns.
dependencies: Data ownership map across all PII tables/entities
Operational approval workflow for deletion policies

issue: SOC2 Partial: Access control split between permitAll filter chain and custom interceptor/manual checks
tasks: Refactor `SecurityFilterChain` to deny-by-default and explicit public allowlist
Implement `JwtAuthenticationFilter` (`OncePerRequestFilter`) and populate `SecurityContext`
Add centralized auth error handling (`AuthenticationEntryPoint`, `AccessDeniedHandler`)
Remove manual bearer parsing from controllers/services
Migrate existing interceptor-only checks to Spring Security primitives
Run endpoint-by-endpoint regression security tests
complexity_reason: High blast radius authentication change; every endpoint behavior (401/403/public) must be revalidated.

issue: SOC2 Partial: RBAC exists but is uneven and not centralized
tasks: Enable method security globally and define authorization conventions
Implement custom `PermissionEvaluator` and workspace-scoped checks
Replace manual role checks with `@PreAuthorize` across critical methods
Normalize role-permission model and repository access patterns
Add permission-cache invalidation strategy and tests
complexity_reason: Touches many service/controller methods and requires careful compatibility with existing role semantics.
dependencies: Role model cleanup and data seeding strategy

issue: SOC2 Partial: Audit logging coverage is limited to selected actions
tasks: Define critical action catalog and audit schema
Implement `@Auditable` annotation and AOP capture layer
Create async `AuditWriter` with structured JSON and correlation IDs
Persist audit records to DB and optional immutable archive
Instrument auth/privilege/data-change flows
Add tamper-evidence/hash-chain verification tests
complexity_reason: Cross-cutting instrumentation with performance sensitivity and schema design requirements for long-term storage.
dependencies: Storage sizing and retention policy alignment

issue: SOC2 Missing: Redis caching controls absent because Redis integration is absent
tasks: Add Spring Data Redis dependency and `RedisConfig`
Implement token revocation cache (`jti`) and logout invalidation
Implement login/API rate-limiting filter backed by Redis counters
Add policy/permission cache namespaces and TTL standards
Add resilience/fallback behavior when Redis is unavailable
Add integration tests against Redis test container
complexity_reason: Net-new infra integration but bounded scope if limited to revocation/rate-limit/policy cache primitives.
dependencies: Redis instance provisioning and network/security setup

issue: SOC2 Missing: Riak storage controls absent because Riak integration is absent
tasks: Introduce Riak client configuration and health integration
Implement `RiakComplianceStore` abstraction and bucket conventions
Build write/read adapters for audit/privacy artifacts
Add metadata model (owner, purpose, retention, checksum)
Integrate encryption before Riak write path
Add failure/retry and archive retrieval tests
complexity_reason: Greenfield NoSQL integration with serialization, metadata, and reliability concerns; requires operational readiness.
dependencies: Riak cluster availability and bucket policy setup
Crypto/key management dependency for encrypted payloads

issue: SOC2 Missing: Centralized monitoring/tracing instrumentation not implemented
tasks: Enable Micrometer metrics and structured telemetry baseline
Instrument auth/security counters and API latency/status metrics
Add correlation-id propagation interceptor/filter
Define alertable SLO/SLI metrics and tags
Add dashboards/alerts hooks for security events
Add load tests to validate overhead
complexity_reason: Implementation is straightforward but requires alignment with runtime observability stack and naming conventions.

issue: ISO27001 Partial: Encryption practice is mixed (BCrypt good, AES utility weak)
tasks: Design `CryptoService` with AES-GCM envelope format
Integrate key-id aware encryption/decryption APIs
Replace legacy `EncryptionUtil` usages in auth/user flows
Add cryptographic test vectors and backward compatibility migration strategy
Add key rotation support hooks in crypto layer
complexity_reason: Security-critical refactor with backward compatibility constraints for previously encrypted values.
dependencies: Data migration plan for old encrypted payloads

issue: ISO27001 Partial: Secure configuration has unsafe defaults (useSSL=false, ddl-auto=update)
tasks: Create secure baseline config validator and fail-fast startup checks
Harden prod properties (DB TLS, actuator, CORS, SQL logging levels)
Add profile-specific configuration tests
Document and enforce non-dev forbidden config values
complexity_reason: Mostly configuration and guardrail logic with limited code churn.
dependencies: Infra cert setup for DB/Redis/Riak TLS
Deployment pipeline update for secure env vars

issue: ISO27001 Partial: Risk controls are selective, not codified uniformly
tasks: Define security control baseline and annotation model (`@SensitiveOperation`)
Implement enforcement interceptor/policy service
Add CI architecture/security policy checks (e.g., ArchUnit rules)
Refactor high-risk endpoints/services to baseline controls
Add control conformance reporting
complexity_reason: Framework-level changes plus broad adoption effort across existing modules.
dependencies: Security governance ownership for policy definitions
Team adoption and code-review checklist updates

issue: ISO27001 Missing: Secrets management pattern not compliant (secrets in properties)
tasks: Replace hardcoded properties with env/secret references
Implement `SecretProvider` abstraction and startup validation
Integrate Vault/KMS/secret manager client for runtime retrieval
Rotate exposed credentials and invalidate old secrets
Update deployment manifests/pipelines for secret injection
complexity_reason: App and infra changes are tightly coupled; credential rotation must be coordinated with zero downtime.
dependencies: Secret manager provisioning and IAM policies
Credential rotation windows with external providers (DB, SMTP, Stripe, etc.)

issue: ISO27001 Missing: No key rotation/revocation lifecycle for JWT/API secrets
tasks: Design key registry model (`kid`, status, activation, revocation timestamps)
Implement `JwtKeyProvider` supporting active/previous keys
Add token minting with `kid` and validation by key id
Implement admin/internal key revoke/rollover workflow
Add cache invalidation and propagation for revocation events
Add rotation runbook and automated rotation tests
complexity_reason: Authentication core behavior changes and requires safe rollout for existing active tokens.

issue: ISO27001 Missing: No systematic field-level encryption for sensitive persisted data
tasks: Identify sensitive fields across entities and repositories
Implement JPA `AttributeConverter` or encrypted-field abstraction
Apply encryption/decryption to entity persistence path
Build migration job to re-encrypt existing plaintext data
Update query/index strategy for encrypted fields
Add masking in DTO mappers and privileged-read checks
complexity_reason: Large data-model impact, migration complexity, query behavior changes, and high backward compatibility risk.
dependencies: Crypto service and key lifecycle readiness
Data migration window and rollback strategy

issue: Cross-cutting Risk: Sensitive data appears in logs and exception messages
tasks: Define log redaction policy (PII/token/session patterns)
Implement centralized redaction/masking in logging pipeline
Add global exception translator with sanitized API error model
Refactor controllers to remove raw payload/exception message logging
Add tests for redaction and safe error responses
complexity_reason: Cross-cutting but technically straightforward; main effort is endpoint cleanup and regression validation.
dependencies: Agreement on masking rules and observability format

issue: GDPR Missing: Personal data inventory and access registry is not centralized
tasks: Define inventory schema and ownership model
Implement inventory APIs and service
Tag DTO/entity fields by data class/sensitivity
Build storage/access mapping views
Add governance reports and tests
complexity_reason: Cross-cutting metadata capture across many modules with governance validation dependency.

issue: GDPR Missing: Minors (under 16) consent and age-gating controls are not implemented
tasks: Add age verification fields/validation
Implement parental consent workflow
Block processing without valid consent state
Add audit trail and expiry handling
Add integration/regression tests
complexity_reason: Changes user onboarding and consent states with legal-policy sensitivity and compatibility impact.

issue: GDPR Missing: Cookie and form consent lifecycle controls are not comprehensively implemented
tasks: Implement consent preference APIs
Capture form-level consent evidence
Add opt-in/opt-out/withdraw endpoints
Integrate consent checks into messaging/forms
Add consent reporting and tests
complexity_reason: Requires coordination with frontend behavior and persistent consent history enforcement.

issue: GDPR Missing: Third-party processor and international transfer governance is not modeled
tasks: Create processor and transfer schema
Build processor registry APIs
Capture transfer safeguards and assessments
Link processors to data flows
Add periodic review workflow
complexity_reason: Mostly governance data modeling with lower runtime risk but depends on policy inputs.

issue: GDPR Missing: Breach response and 72-hour notification workflow is not implemented
tasks: Design incident state machine
Implement breach incident APIs
Add timer-based 72-hour escalation logic
Build authority/user notification tracking
Create post-incident action records
complexity_reason: Workflow orchestration and SLA-driven operations require reliable state transitions and alerting.

total_estimated_timeline: Single-team sequential: ~28-36 weeks. With 3 parallel streams (Security Core, Privacy/Data Rights, Platform/Observability): ~14-18 weeks including integration hardening.
critical_path_items: SOC2 Partial: Access control split between permitAll filter chain and custom interceptor/manual checks
SOC2 Partial: RBAC exists but is uneven and not centralized
ISO27001 Missing: Secrets management pattern not compliant (secrets in properties)
ISO27001 Missing: No key rotation/revocation lifecycle for JWT/API secrets
ISO27001 Partial: Encryption practice is mixed (BCrypt good, AES utility weak)
ISO27001 Missing: No systematic field-level encryption for sensitive persisted data
GDPR Missing: Centralized retention/deletion policy engine for PII
GDPR Missing: Minors (under 16) consent and age-gating controls are not implemented
GDPR Missing: Breach response and 72-hour notification workflow is not implemented
quick_wins: ISO27001 Partial: Secure configuration has unsafe defaults (useSSL=false, ddl-auto=update)
Cross-cutting Risk: Sensitive data appears in logs and exception messages
SOC2 Missing: Centralized monitoring/tracing instrumentation not implemented
SOC2 Missing: Redis caching controls absent because Redis integration is absent
GDPR Missing: Third-party processor and international transfer governance is not modeled
